free_text: Differential Neutron Production Cross Sections for
Proton beam monitored using secondary electron monitor.
Data averaged over bins widths. Neutron energy given
midpoint of bin.  The resolution given is the bin
and uncertainty in background and shadow-bar
Data received by email, R. Byrd, 10 September 1998.
Last 2 points at 60 degrees deleted as per
